Details List.SourceString: Play notes as they overlap the targets on the line. The better your timing, the higher your score.
Details List.LocalizedString: Play notes as they overlap the targets on the line. The better your timing, the higher your score.

Details List.SourceString: Playing Mic Vocals? Sing into your mic and match the pitch of the incoming notes. The more accurate your pitch, the higher your score.
Details List.LocalizedString: Playing Mic Vocals? Sing into your mic and match the pitch of the incoming notes. The more accurate your pitch, the higher your score.

Details List.SourceString: Hit every note to build a streak and boost your score multiplier.
Details List.LocalizedString: Hit every note to build a streak and boost your score multiplier.

Details List.SourceString: As your points increase, you earn stars — up to five. Expert players can earn gold stars!
Details List.LocalizedString: As your points increase, you earn stars — up to five. Expert players can earn gold stars!
